name: Bug Fix: Memory Leak in Data Cache

task.prompt: The application is experiencing memory growth over time. Investigate the data cache implementation in src/cache.ts and identify the memory leak. Fix the issue and ensure the cache properly evicts old entries when it reaches maxSize.
task.context: Users report the app slows down after running for several hours.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Cache implements eviction when exceeding maxSize
Cache size is checked before adding new entries
No TypeScript errors in fixed code
